title: Make calendar_helper check OAuth before executing and delegate to capability gate
goal: calendar_helper 플러그인이 실행 전에 OAuth 토큰을 확인하고, 없으면 링크를 바로 만들지 않고 needs_setup 상태를 반환한다. 사용자가 연결하거나 폴백을 선택한 후에만 결과를 반환한다.

test_requirements.case: calendar_helper with OAuth token creates event via API
test_requirements.expected: success=True, data has event from API

test_requirements.case: calendar_helper without OAuth token returns needs_connection result
test_requirements.expected: success=False, error contains 'connection required', data has fallback_url

test_requirements.case: capability_gate detects calendar_helper as needing OAuth
test_requirements.expected: check_capabilities returns missing capability for google_calendar

test_requirements.case: Fallback URL is still included in result for frontend to use
test_requirements.expected: data.fallback_url contains google calendar template link

test_requirements.case: Existing calendar link generation logic preserved as fallback
test_requirements.expected: when fallback requested, same link as before is returned

constraints: Do not remove the link generation code — move it to a _build_fallback_link() method
Plugin run() should: check OAuth → if yes: API call → if no: return error with fallback_url
The error result must include fallback_url so frontend can offer 'use link instead' option
capability_gate.py must recognize calendar_helper as needing google_calendar OAuth
Existing calendar tests that don't mock OAuth should still work (they test link generation path)
test_command: cd backend && python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -v
test_focus_command: cd backend && python3 -m unittest tests.test_plugins tests.test_capability_gate -v
